title: spermacoce cristulata
intro: Spermacoce cristulata, also known as the "Tropical Buttonbush", is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Spermacoce cristulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, dried and powdered for use in herbal remedies.
